OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

CONNECTOR_DURATION_PERIOD.description: The period of time to await between two runs of the connector.

SWIMLANE_API_BASE_URL.description: Base URL of the Swimlane instance (e.g. https://swimlane.example.com).

SWIMLANE_API_TOKEN.description: Swimlane API token (Personal Access Token) used for authentication.

SWIMLANE_APPLICATION_ID.description: ID of the Swimlane application whose records are imported.

SWIMLANE_MAX_RECORDS.description: Maximum number of records to fetch per run.

SWIMLANE_TLP_LEVEL.description: TLP marking applied to the imported case-incidents.

SWIMLANE_SSL_VERIFY.description: Whether to verify the SSL certificate of the Swimlane instance.
